title: Just QoL
description: A simple quality-of-life modpack built to be lightweight and efficient.
body:
# Just QoL!
# About:  
Just QoL is a simple, lightweight Fabric modpack designed with low-end machines in mind, without sacrificing the QoL mods and texture packs that make Minecraft more enjoyable.

The goal is a vanilla experience that runs smoothly while quietly improving usability and performance.
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

## Optimization

Sodium: High-performance renderer.\
Sodium Extra: Extra graphics and QoL options for Sodium.\
Lithium: Game logic and server optimizations.\
FerriteCore: Reduces memory usage.\
ImmediatelyFast: Faster UI and rendering paths.\
EntityCulling: Skips rendering unseen entities.\
MoreCulling: Extra block and model culling.\
CullLeaves: Optimized leaf rendering.\
BadOptimizations: Fixes inefficient vanilla code.\
Dynamic FPS: Lowers usage when idle or tabbed out.\
ScalableLux: Faster lighting engine.\
FPS Booster: FPS booster command that disables everything execpt the GUI. \
RenderScale: Dynamic resolution scaling.

## Libraries

Fabric API: Core Fabric API.\
Fabric Language Kotlin: Kotlin support for Fabric mods.\
Architectury: Cross-loader compatibility.\
Cloth Config: Config GUI library.\
Forge Config API Port: Forge config support.\
Yet Another Config Lib (YACL): Modern config UI.\
MidnightLib: Shared utility library.\
TCD Commons: Shared utilities.\
Puzzle: Resource pack backend.\
Placeholder API: Text placeholders.\
Widgets: UI widget library.\
HudLib: HUD backend library.\
YOSBR: Keeps configs clean.

## HUD & Info

AppleSkin: Hunger and saturation HUD.\
Jade: Block and entity info HUD.\
Armor HUD: Displays armor status.\
Better Mount HUD: Improved riding HUD.\
ShulkerBoxTooltip: View shulker contents.\
NoChatClearMod: Prevents chat clearing.\
Quit From Game Menu: Adds quit button.\
Gamma Utils: Adjustable gamma.\
Zoomify: Smooth zoom.\
Chat Heads: Player heads in chat.\
FireHUD: Reduced fire overlay.\
Better Advancements: Improved advancements UI.\
Better Statistics: Enhanced stats screen.

## QoL

Better Boat Movement: Improved boat handling.\
Trade Cycling: Reroll villager trades safely.\
Dynamic Crosshair: Context-aware crosshair.\
Allow Portal GUIs: Use GUIs in portals.\
Language Reload: Reload language without restart.\
No Resource Pack Warnings: Disables RP warnings.\
No Telemetry: Disables Mojang telemetry.\
No Chat Reports: Disables chat reporting.\
OptiGUI: Custom GUIs via resource packs.\
Hold my items: Animations for the first-person hand. 

## Visuals

Iris: Shader loader for Sodium.\
Continuity: Connected textures.\
LambDynamicLights: Dynamic item lighting.\
LambdaBetterGrass: Improved grass visuals.\
SkinLayers 3D: 3D player skin layers.\
Fadeless: Removes fade effects.\
Entity Texture Features: Enhanced entity textures.\
Animatica: Resource-pack animations.\
Skyboxify: Custom skyboxes.\
Capes: Custom cape support.

## Utility

Bobby: Extended render distance.\
Freecam: Detachable camera mode.\
Fabrishot: High-resolution screenshots.

## Social

Chat Animation: Smooth chat animations.\
Simple Voice Chat: Proximity voice chat.

## Crashing & Debugging

Not Enough Crashes: Better crash screens.\
Crash Assistant: Crash diagnostics.\
CrashFixer: Fixes common crashes.

## Multiplayer

Simple Voice Chat: Proximity voice chat.


</details>


___
# Why This Modpack?
becuase performance modpacks tend to forget a few QoL mods that are nice to have installed and binded for you. and other modpacks tend to forget optimization mods.
Just QoL aims to be balance both:

- Strong and stable performance on *VERY* low-end hardware
- All the QoL mods that anyone would need
- Minimal visual changes
- reasonable default keybinds and settings

___
Feedback and suggestions are always appreciated!
